steps.title: Identify fish contribution from each tank type
steps.content:
Small tanks hold 1 fish each. If there are $s$ small tanks, they hold $s \cdot 1 = s$ fish total.

Large tanks hold 2 fish each. If there are $b$ large tanks, they hold $b \cdot 2 = 2b$ fish total.

steps.title: Write the equation for total fish
steps.content:
The total number of fish is the sum of fish from small tanks and large tanks:

$$s + 2b = 37$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
